svg.title: MASO framework architecture with contract governance and Deviance Judge
svg.desc: Multi-Agent Security Operations framework showing six control domains, ATCBG contract layer, four-state deviation model, Deviance Judge, three tiers, and PACE resilience

g.text: Poisoned handoffs · Transitive authority · Hallucination amplification · False consensus
ATCBG: Agentic task contract and behavioural governance

svg.text: Maps to: OWASP LLM Top 10 · Agentic Security Initiative · 8 epistemic risks (EP-01 to EP-08)
